title: atriplex tatarica var. diffusa
intro: Atriplex tatarica var. diffusa, also known as the Russian thistle or Tatar saltwort, is a type of succulent shrub that belongs to the amaranth family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Atriplex tatarica var. diffusa include reducing swelling and inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and helping to manage conditions like high blood pressure and arthritis. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional remedies for its supposed ability to treat a range of ailments.
